APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE NANCY ANGEL, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARVIN A. SORTO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SORTO, MARVIN A $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
